name: Richard Anglon
title: Fullstack Software Engineer
tagline: I build secure, scalable systems using .NET, React, PostgreSQL, Docker, and modern cloud technologies.
aboutParagraphs: I'm a fullstack software engineer specializing in building production-grade systems with .NET, ASP.NET Core, and modern frontend frameworks. My work focuses on designing clean, maintainable architectures that handle real-world complexity — from tax authority integrations to CI/CD infrastructure.
I care deeply about code quality, security, and operational reliability. Every system I build is designed to be tested, monitored, and maintained by the team that comes after me.
When I'm not writing code, I'm usually improving the development infrastructure — automating builds, streamlining deployments, or hardening authentication flows.
